## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On October 25, 1917, the incredibly massive, universally defining, and absolutely catastrophic October Revolution officially and aggressively erupted in Russia (according to the Julian calendar then in use). The incredibly massive, heavily armed Bolshevik Red Guards, aggressively led by Vladimir Lenin and Leon Trotsky, violently stormed the massive Winter Palace in Petrograd. This massive, incredibly brutal coup completely overthrew the deeply fragile Russian Provisional Government, absolutely and permanently cementing the massive, dictatorial creation of the world's first massive communist state, the Soviet Union.

On October 25, 1983, the incredibly massive, highly aggressive, and deeply controversial Operation Urgent Fury officially commenced. US President Ronald Reagan aggressively ordered a massive, overwhelming military invasion of the small Caribbean island nation of Grenada.
